evals.name: happy-path-real-ticket
evals.expected_output: Writes runs/<KEY>/jira.json with full schema populated; renders compact summary in chat with status, labels, comments count, linked + similar tickets, and a 'Next: /triage <KEY>' hint.

evals.name: missing-ticket-key
evals.expected_output: Aborts with a friendly 'ticket not found / no permission' error that names the key. No jira.json written. No similar-search attempted.

evals.name: refetch-without-force
evals.expected_output: Detects existing runs/<KEY>/jira.json, prints 'already fetched' message with relative age, points at --force, prints 'Next: /triage <KEY>'. Does not re-call acli.

evals.name: refetch-with-force
evals.expected_output: Refetches and overwrites jira.json. New fetched_at timestamp in the file. Renders fresh compact summary.
